nasb.text: But thanks be to God that though you were slaves of sin, you became obedient from the heart to that form of teaching to which you were committed,

esv.text: But thanks be to God, that you who were once slaves of sin have become obedient from the heart to the standard of teaching to which you were committed,

cnv.text: 感謝　神，你們雖然作過罪的奴僕，現在卻從心裡順從了傳授給你們的教義的規範。

ccb.text: 感谢上帝！你们从前虽然做过罪的奴隶，现在却衷心服从了所传给你们的教导，

csbs.text: 感谢神！虽然你们过去是罪的奴仆，但现在却从心里顺从了所传给你们的教导内容，
